recommendations.title: Pin

recommendations.title: The Spiral
recommendations.overview: A young pathologist seeks answers to the mysterious death of a friend and soon comes into contact with the same cursed videotape that caused the death of the friend's wife and son, which is haunted by the curse of Sadako, a relentless spirit.

recommendations.title: The Open House
recommendations.overview: A teenager and his mother find themselves besieged by threatening forces when they move into a new house.

recommendations.title: Lucca's World
recommendations.overview: Determined to help her son, who has cerebral palsy, Bárbara takes her family to India for an experimental treatment.

recommendations.title: House at the End of the Street
recommendations.overview: A mother and daughter move to a new town and find themselves living next door to a house where a young girl murdered her parents. When the daughter befriends the surviving son, she learns the story is far from over.

recommendations.title: Oddity
recommendations.overview: After the brutal murder of her twin sister, Darcy goes after those responsible by using haunted items as her tools for revenge.

recommendations.title: House
recommendations.overview: Hoping to find a sense of connection to her late mother, Gorgeous takes a trip with her friends to visit her aunt's ancestral house in the countryside. The girls soon discover that there is more to the old house than meets the eye.

recommendations.title: Ghostland

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Deader
recommendations.overview: When a tough-as-nails reporter is lead to a mysterious cult and the evil Pinhead, any moment could be her last.
